title: Finance phishing campaign — March 2026
summary: Phishing email with malicious Excel macro targeted Finance team. Two users opened attachment. No data exfiltration confirmed — payload blocked by AV.
kql_queries_used: OfficeActivity | where UserId in ('jsmith@corp.com','klee@corp.com') | where Operation == 'AttachmentAccessed'
DeviceProcessEvents | where DeviceName in ('DESKTOP-42','DESKTOP-33') | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ 'excel.exe'
lessons_learned: Add macro-execution alert rule for Office apps; finance team needs refresher training.

title: Service account password spray — January 2026
summary: Low-and-slow password spray targeting service accounts from Tor exit node. 3 accounts locked out. No successful authentication.
kql_queries_used: SigninLogs | where ResultType == '50053' | summarize count() by IPAddress, UserPrincipalName | where count_ > 5
lessons_learned: Implement Conditional Access for service accounts; enforce IP allowlisting for non-interactive accounts.
